name: Tex-Mex Taco Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cream cheese, cottage cheese and taco seasoning in a food processor or blender for 30 seconds or until smooth.
2. Refrigerate mixture for several hours before serving (this can be done up to a day ahead).
3. To serve, mound the cheese-taco mixture on a large platter.
4. Cover with salsa.
5. Mix prepared vegetables together, including avocado if using.
6. Cover salsa with about 3/4 of the vegetables.
7. Reserve the remaining vegetables to be added when serving.
8. Sprinkle cheese on top surrounded by taco chips.
9. Serves a crowd.
